response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified performers Shiranui Flare and Hoshimachi Suisei from video and context.
2. Detected 'Pink Rose' at start. Searched for original artist/composer. Found Kiyommy+Seiya (Seiya Murai, Kiyomi Kumano).
3. Detected 'Chase! Chase! Chase!' at 02:22. On-screen text identified lyricist as Fujoshi no Manami and composer as Kataoka. Search confirmed these are the creators, lyrics are likely original to this performance or obscure. Transcribed lyrics from on-screen display.
4. Compiled metadata and full lyrics for both songs into the JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a musical performance by VTubers Shiranui Flare and Hoshimachi Suisei. They perform 'Pink Rose' followed by the song 'Chase! Chase! Chase!'.

scenes.description: Shiranui Flare and Hoshimachi Suisei perform 'Pink Rose'. The song features vocal harmony and choreographed dance.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
P-l-e-a-s-e d-o n-o-t c-r-y
You don't know what it really means to be alone
Like dew on pale flower petals
My tears still cling on...

Ah, don't you touch me
Those hands of yours are so warm
They make me all mixed-up inside

Hey, I won't forgive you
For trying to patch up the wound you left
That smile on your face that you're giving to me
Well, I can't go back from it now

All the times that I fell for that sweet fragrance
It grows worse each moment and it's happening again

H-o-l-d m-e i-n y-o-u-r a-r-m-s
And just this once, pretend you have love in your heart
That's the #1 thing that I wish
I don't, I don't want anything else

Bloomin' like a rose
You don't know what it really means to be alone
Like dew on pale flower petals
My tears still cling on
